disambiguation.note: This artifact is a civic metadata R&D testcase inside ALMS. It is not an official agency, badge, warrant, demand, subpoena, or investigative authority.

purpose: Lead Alabama ALMS testcase for converting vibe-coded civic metadata into receipt-gated audit structure.

vernacular.plain_english: If it ain't got a receipt, it ain't green.
vernacular.alabama_rhythm: Show the paper trail, keep the story honest, and don't call it authority unless the receipt can carry it.

lifecycle.meaning: ideas, sketches, metadata drafts, and local-only receipts
file committed to GitHub with path and commit SHA
ready for IPFS/EAS/Zora/Base only after real external receipt exists
requires explicit written authority, legal basis, scope, minimization, and chain of custody

genesis_key.command:
mkdir -p receipts/alms && TS=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ) && cat > receipts/alms/abi-genesis-key.local.json <<JSON
{"artifact":"ALABAMA_BOUNDARY_INQUIRY_ABI_GENESIS_KEY_V0_1","ens":"jaywisdom.eth","basename":"jaywisdom.base.eth","timestamp_utc":"$TS","authority":false,"no_fake_green":true,"scope":"local-only shell receipt"}
JSON
sha256sum receipts/alms/abi-genesis-key.local.json

green: local receipt hash exists after command is run
